message:
Command `# Check if docs/advisory dir exists, and look at the BFM_CHECK readback values more closely
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/advisory/
grep "BFM_CHECK\|readback" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build/*.log | head -30` executed with exit code 0.
